# Scenario: [Name]

## Goal
What business outcome does this achieve?

## Preconditions
- User exists with...
- Subscription is in state...

## Steps
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Result
What should be true after the scenario completes?

## Edge Cases
- What if payment fails?
- What if user doesn't exist?

## Linked Rules
- [Rule: Name](../../business/rules/name)

## Integration Test
- Status: yes / no / partial
- File: `api/tests/integration/name.test.ts`

## Dev CLI Support
- Status: yes / no
- Command: `yarn dev:tools scenario <name>`
